---
title: Bois rond
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549184/fontainebleauboisrond_o9pshx.jpg
description: Bois rond à Fontainebleau
categories: ["urbansketching"]
date: 2024/10/24
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1784549184/fontainebleauboisrond_o9pshx.jpg)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
